last_completed_round.hypothesis: Keep the measured 64x384 hot band, but treat the c_shared epilogue/export path as the easiest budget source for the main loop rather than as a standalone store path. On the restored base, the hot peeled kernel still allocates 46.592 KB shared per block and spends a float c_shared round-trip at src/kernels/bf16_gemm_v1.cu:570-574 and :668-699 while headline tensor active stays only 35.06 and mio throttle stays 35.64. Compressing or lightening that c_shared path should be pursued only if the saved shared-memory budget can be reinvested into a deeper A/B prefetch window or otherwise wider hot-path overlap at :599-666. The success condition is not merely fewer export stores; it is buying overlap budget back for the tensor loop.
